Example_EN: The factory uses a robot to pack the boxes.
Example_CN: 工厂用机器人打包纸箱。

Example_EN: The lake water was crystal clear after rain.
Example_CN: 雨后湖水清澈如水晶。

Example_EN: Please use the emergency exit nearest to you.
Example_CN: 请使用离你最近的紧急出口。

Example_EN: She booked an appointment at the dental clinic.
Example_CN: 她在牙科诊所预约了时间。

Example_EN: The cat is sleeping underneath the sofa again.
Example_CN: 猫又在沙发下面睡觉。

Collocation: local tribe;tribe member;belong to a tribe
Example_EN: The museum explains life in an ancient tribe.
Example_CN: 博物馆讲解古代部落的生活。

Example_EN: She finished the race incredibly fast.
Example_CN: 她以难以置信的速度跑完全程。

Collocation: interrupt someone;sorry to interrupt;interrupt a meeting
Example_EN: Please do not interrupt while others are speaking.
Example_CN: 别人讲话时请不要打断。

Example_EN: Do not skip breakfast before a long exam.
Example_CN: 长考前不要不吃早餐。

Example_EN: Police are still looking for a clear motive.
Example_CN: 警方仍在寻找明确动机。

Example_CN: 孩子们用软橡皮泥捏动物。

Example_CN: 卡车每天清晨给商店送货。

Example_CN: 护士会测你的脉搏和血压。

Example_CN: 严格说来，该规则仍然适用。

Example_EN: Plants produce oxygen that humans need to breathe.
Example_CN: 植物产生人类呼吸所需的氧气。

Example_EN: She still talks politely with her ex about the children.
Example_CN: 她仍礼貌地和前夫谈孩子的事。

Example_CN: 过量饮酒会损伤肝脏。

Example_EN: The surgeon explained the operation carefully.
Example_CN: 外科医生仔细解释了手术。

Example_CN: 他们在小俱乐部听现场爵士乐。

Example_EN: Add milk powder to the mixture and stir well.
Example_CN: 把奶粉加入混合物并搅拌均匀。

Example_EN: Explorers reached the North Pole after many months.
Example_CN: 探险队数月后抵达北极。

Example_EN: The accident left him with deep emotional trauma.
Example_CN: 事故给他留下深刻的心理创伤。

Example_EN: Goats climbed easily over the rocky hill.
Example_CN: 山羊轻松爬上多石的山丘。

Example_CN: 有人对这个计划有异议吗？

Example_EN: Schools should not punish pupils unfairly.
Example_CN: 学校不应不公平地处罚学生。

Example_EN: If you ask nicely, she may lend you the book.
Example_CN: 你客气地问，她可能会把书借给你。

Example_EN: He felt tense before the big interview.
Example_CN: 重大面试前他感到紧张。

Example_EN: The history assignment is due on Friday.
Example_CN: 历史作业周五截止。

Example_EN: This model offers superior quality at a fair price.
Example_CN: 这一型号以合理价格提供更优品质。

Example_EN: The train will arrive shortly; please wait.
Example_CN: 火车即将抵达，请稍候。

Example_EN: Her ultimate goal is to become a doctor.
Example_CN: 她的终极目标是成为医生。

Collocation: go to the cinema;local cinema;cinema ticket
Example_EN: Shall we go to the cinema this evening?
Example_CN: 我们今晚去看电影好吗？

Example_EN: We were halfway through the book by Friday.
Example_CN: 到周五我们把书读了一半。

Example_EN: Rub your hands together to warm them up.
Example_CN: 搓搓手让手暖和起来。

Example_EN: Teenagers often meet friends at the shopping mall.
Example_CN: 青少年常在购物中心与朋友见面。

Example_EN: Fill the bucket with water from the tap.
Example_CN: 用龙头的水把桶装满。

Example_EN: She put her hands on her hips and waited.
Example_CN: 她双手叉腰等候。

Example_EN: Age does not always bring wisdom, but experience helps.
Example_CN: 年龄未必带来智慧，但经验有帮助。

Example_CN: 机场用雷达追踪每架飞机。

Example_CN: 两只鸟在老橡树上筑了巢。

Collocation: force of gravity;gravity of the situation;zero gravity
Example_EN: Gravity pulls objects towards the centre of the Earth.
Example_CN: 重力把物体拉向地心。

Example_EN: Solar panels on the roof cut the electricity bill.
Example_CN: 屋顶太阳能电池板降低了电费。

Example_EN: She felt safe amongst friends at the party.
Example_CN: 在派对的朋友中间她感到安心。

Example_EN: On the contrary, the plan worked better than expected.
Example_CN: 恰恰相反，计划比预期更有效。

Example_EN: She keeps a diary of her travel each night.
Example_CN: 她每晚写旅行日记。

Example_EN: Click the green button to start the download.
Example_CN: 点击绿色按钮开始下载。

Example_EN: Please do not interfere with his work today.
Example_CN: 请今天不要妨碍他的工作。

Example_EN: The farmer keeps a large herd of cattle.
Example_CN: 农场主养着一大群牛。

Example_CN: 医生对某些癌症使用谨慎的放射治疗。

Example_CN: 每位求职者将有一次短面试。

Example_CN: 当事情感觉不对时相信直觉。

Collocation: form an alliance;military alliance;in alliance with

Example_CN: 两党在表决前结成同盟。

Example_EN: He was physically tired after the long climb.
Example_CN: 漫长攀登后他身体疲惫。

Example_EN: The country became a republic after the revolution.
Example_CN: 革命后该国成为共和国。

Example_CN: 一根木梁支撑着旧屋顶。

Collocation: bow and arrow;arrow key;follow the arrow

Example_CN: 顺着绿色箭头走到出口大厅。

Example_EN: Acid rain can damage trees and stone buildings.
Example_CN: 酸雨会损害树木与石质建筑。

Example_EN: The truck can carry about ten tons of sand.
Example_CN: 卡车大约能运十吨沙。

Example_EN: His ankle began to swell after the fall.
Example_CN: 跌倒后他的脚踝开始肿起来。

Example_EN: These shoes are a real bargain at half price.
Example_CN: 这双鞋半价，真划算。

Example_EN: They play chess every Saturday in the park.
Example_CN: 他们每周六在公园下国际象棋。

Example_EN: Dancers must keep to the rhythm of the music.
Example_CN: 舞者必须跟上音乐节奏。

Example_EN: Workers rolled a heavy oil barrel onto the truck.
Example_CN: 工人把沉重油桶滚上卡车。

Example_EN: Smoking can seriously damage your lungs.
Example_CN: 吸烟会严重损害肺部。

Example_EN: Many young people want jobs in the tech industry.
Example_CN: 许多年轻人想进入科技行业工作。

Example_EN: Wrap the cut so it does not bleed too much.
Example_CN: 包扎伤口以免血流太多。

Example_EN: Please keep your desk neat during the exam.
Example_CN: 考试期间请保持桌面整洁。

Chinese: 共产主义者；共产主义的
Example_EN: He wrote a history of communist movements in Europe.
Example_CN: 他写了一部欧洲共产主义运动史。

Collocation: blank page;blank stare;fill in the blank
Example_EN: Start your draft on a blank page.
Example_CN: 在空白页上开始起草。

Example_EN: New students toured the university campus today.
Example_CN: 新生今天参观了大学校园。

Example_EN: Tea after dinner is their family ritual.
Example_CN: 饭后喝茶是他们的家庭习惯仪式。

Collocation: fall prey to;prey on;bird of prey
Example_EN: The hawk circled before diving on its prey.
Example_CN: 老鹰盘旋后扑向猎物。
MemoryTip: prey：猎物（与 pray 同音异义）。

Example_EN: The Greek myth explains the changing seasons.
Example_CN: 希腊神话解释了季节变化。

Collocation: execution of a plan;public execution;poor execution
Example_EN: Good ideas fail without careful execution.
Example_CN: 缺少细致执行，好想法也会失败。

Example_EN: Smoking is strictly forbidden in this building.
Example_CN: 本楼内严禁吸烟。

Example_EN: Paris remains a popular travel destination.
Example_CN: 巴黎仍是热门旅游目的地。

Example_EN: He lost consciousness for a few seconds after the fall.
Example_CN: 跌倒后他失去意识几秒钟。

Example_EN: The heart is a vital organ in the body.
Example_CN: 心脏是身体的重要器官。

Example_EN: Astronauts train for life in outer space.
Example_CN: 宇航员为外层空间生活接受训练。

Example_EN: Spray water on the plants every morning.
Example_CN: 每天早晨给植物喷水。

Example_EN: Plug in the laptop before the battery dies.
Example_CN: 电池耗尽前给笔记本插上电。

Example_EN: Staff must follow the safety protocol in the lab.
Example_CN: 员工在实验室必须遵守安全规程。

Example_EN: Drink enough water to support healthy kidneys.
Example_CN: 多喝水有助肾脏健康。

Example_EN: The novel describes an alien invasion of Earth.
Example_CN: 小说描写外星人入侵地球。

Example_EN: Their airplane landed ten minutes early.
Example_CN: 他们的飞机提前十分钟降落。

Example_EN: You need parental consent for the school trip.
Example_CN: 参加学校旅行需要家长同意。

Example_EN: We spent the evening on a 500-piece puzzle.
Example_CN: 我们整晚拼一幅五百片拼图。

Example_EN: Staff received a small bonus at the end of the year.
Example_CN: 员工年终拿到一笔小奖金。

Example_EN: Birds fly south in winter by instinct.
Example_CN: 鸟凭本能在冬天南飞。

Example_EN: Clear the blocked drain before it rains again.
Example_CN: 下次下雨前疏通堵塞的排水管。

Example_EN: She hopes to study physics at university.
Example_CN: 她希望在大学学习物理学。

Example_EN: He gave a thumbs up when the deal was done.
Example_CN: 成交后他竖起大拇指。

Example_EN: This cake recipe has been in our family for years.
Example_CN: 这个蛋糕食谱在我家传了多年。

Example_EN: The museum shows an old guided missile.
Example_CN: 博物馆展出一枚旧制导导弹。

Example_EN: That maths problem is more tricky than it looks.
Example_CN: 那道数学题比看上去更棘手。

Example_EN: Children blew soap bubbles in the garden.
Example_CN: 孩子们在花园里吹肥皂泡。

Collocation: optical illusion;create an illusion;under the illusion
Example_EN: The painting creates an optical illusion of depth.
Example_CN: 这幅画制造了深度的视错觉。

Example_EN: A mole has dug small hills across the lawn.
Example_CN: 鼹鼠在草坪上拱起许多小土堆。
